examples.bio: Current PRs: Run - a 7-minute mile. Current dating goals: Someone who drive and doesn't judge my protein shakes.
Looking for a running partner or someone to stretch with after. Both equally important.
I meal prep on Sundays and never skip leg day. But I also believe in balance - pizza is a food group.
examples.whyItWorks: Physical fitness signals health and vitality

examples.bio: Yes, I wake up at 5am to work out. No, I won't make you join me. Unless you want to.

examples.bio: I take my health seriously but not myself. Will flex for you if asked nicely.
